title: Immersive Slumber
description: Modify the sleep mechanic by skipping nights to accelerated time. Also, various words will pop up while the player is sleeping, and some of them will be relevant to the game world.
body:
In this mod, sleeping at night no longer skips the night but accelerates the passage of time, with the speed varying based on environmental conditions. For example, time acceleration increases if there are no hostile mobs nearby or if the player sleeps indoors, while it slows down under opposite circumstances.

Additionally, various dynamic “text entries” (e.g., dream sequences, environmental interactions) will appear during sleep to enhance immersion. Some entries actively interact with the game world, going beyond mere dream dialogue. The mod currently includes over 500 unique entries (totaling 10,000+ Chinese characters), with plans to expand further. Players can submit their own entries by joining the community group or leaving comments.

This mod integrates with Paster’s Dream and Good Night’s Sleep, allowing players to enter different dreamscapes under specific conditions during sleep.
